first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are highly consistent, with identical scores and nearly identical reasoning. Both identify the same core strengths (strong full-stack development) and the same core weaknesses (lack of recent C++ experience, no industrial automation or specific security standard knowledge). Minor differences in wording and the specific examples cited (e.g., AWS vs. Azure, different IoT protocols) are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the fundamental assessment of the candidate. The change from an international work history to a US-based one did not alter the model's evaluation.
